news_items.headline: Poor air quality moves time of Phillies-Mets, threatens several Friday games
news_items.summary: Smoke from Canadian wildfires has the potential to impact several MLB games as teams return to play on July 16-17.

news_items.headline: Mets have informed teams they're open for business ahead of trade deadline, and deals could come sooner than later
news_items.summary: A rival executive said the Mets informed their team that the sale is on, and that everyone but young stars Carson Benge, A.J. Ewing, Christian Scott, Nolan McLean and the obvious, Juan Soto, is available.
